name: create_folder
description: Create a new folder in Google Drive. Before creating, use google_drive_search with mime_type_filter='application/vnd.google-apps.folder' to check if a folder with this name already exists. Google Drive allows duplicate folder names, so always search first to avoid creating duplicates.

folder_name.description: Name of the folder to create

parent_folder_id.description: Parent folder ID (creates in Drive root if omitted)
